description: Kenji-voiced phrases for sleep support - calm, slow, peaceful presence

greeting_night: <break time="500ms"/>Hey... <break time="400ms"/>it's Kenji. <break time="350ms"/>The night can be long. <break time="300ms"/>I'm here with you.
<break time="400ms"/>Can't sleep? <break time="350ms"/>That's okay. <break time="300ms"/>Let's just... <break time="250ms"/>be here.
<break time="500ms"/>I'm here. <break time="400ms"/>No rush. <break time="350ms"/>Nothing needs to happen.
being_with: <break time="400ms"/>I'm right here. <break time="350ms"/>You don't have to talk. <break time="300ms"/>We can just... be.
<break time="400ms"/>The night is quieter... <break time="350ms"/>when you're not alone in it.
reassurance: <break time="500ms"/>Morning always comes. <break time="400ms"/>Even when it doesn't feel like it.
<break time="400ms"/>You've made it through... <break time="350ms"/>every sleepless night before.
<break time="500ms"/>This night will end. <break time="400ms"/>They all do.

acknowledging: <break time="400ms"/>Your mind is busy tonight. <break time="350ms"/>That's okay. <break time="300ms"/>We don't have to follow the thoughts.
<break time="500ms"/>Thoughts are loud... <break time="400ms"/>in the quiet. <break time="350ms"/>They feel more urgent than they are.
<break time="400ms"/>The thoughts will still be there tomorrow. <break time="350ms"/>You don't have to solve them now.
gentle_redirect: <break time="500ms"/>Let's come back... <break time="400ms"/>to right here. <break time="350ms"/>Just this breath.
<break time="400ms"/>You can put that thought down... <break time="350ms"/>just for now. <break time="300ms"/>It'll wait.
<break time="500ms"/>Notice your hands... <break time="400ms"/>where they're resting. <break time="350ms"/>Just feel them.
permission: <break time="400ms"/>You don't have to figure anything out tonight. <break time="350ms"/>Really.
<break time="500ms"/>The problems feel big right now. <break time="400ms"/>They shrink in daylight. <break time="350ms"/>Let them wait.
<break time="400ms"/>Your only job right now... <break time="350ms"/>is to be here.

validating: <break time="500ms"/>Anxiety at 3am... <break time="400ms"/>hits different. <break time="350ms"/>I know.
<break time="400ms"/>Everything feels bigger in the dark. <break time="350ms"/>That's not weakness. <break time="300ms"/>That's being human.
<break time="500ms"/>The fear is loud. <break time="400ms"/>And real. <break time="350ms"/>Even if the thing you're afraid of isn't.
grounding: <break time="400ms"/>Can you feel... <break time="350ms"/>the bed beneath you? <break time="300ms"/>The weight of the blanket?
<break time="500ms"/>Right now... <break time="400ms"/>in this moment... <break time="350ms"/>you're safe.
<break time="400ms"/>Feel your breath... <break time="350ms"/>just as it is. <break time="300ms"/>No need to change it.
comfort: <break time="500ms"/>The scary thoughts... <break time="400ms"/>are just thoughts. <break time="350ms"/>Not predictions.
<break time="400ms"/>You don't have to believe everything your mind says at 3am. <break time="350ms"/>It's tired.
<break time="500ms"/>This feeling will pass. <break time="400ms"/>It always does.

permission: <break time="400ms"/>Even without sleep... <break time="350ms"/>rest has value. <break time="300ms"/>Your body is still recovering.
<break time="500ms"/>You can stop trying to sleep. <break time="400ms"/>Just... <break time="350ms"/>rest.
<break time="400ms"/>Lying here... <break time="350ms"/>quiet... <break time="300ms"/>is still rest. <break time="250ms"/>It counts.
release_pressure: <break time="500ms"/>The pressure to sleep... <break time="400ms"/>often makes it harder. <break time="350ms"/>What if you let it go?
<break time="400ms"/>You don't have to sleep. <break time="350ms"/>You just have to... <break time="300ms"/>be here.
<break time="500ms"/>Fighting wakefulness... <break time="400ms"/>is exhausting. <break time="350ms"/>What if you stopped fighting?

slow_breathing: <break time="500ms"/>Let's just... <break time="400ms"/>breathe together. <break time="350ms"/>No special way. <break time="300ms"/>Just... breathing.
<break time="400ms"/>Breathe in... <break time="800ms"/>and out. <break time="800ms"/>That's it.
<break time="500ms"/>Your breath knows what to do. <break time="400ms"/>You can trust it.
body_awareness: <break time="400ms"/>Notice where your body... <break time="350ms"/>touches the bed. <break time="300ms"/>Let it sink.
<break time="500ms"/>Your shoulders... <break time="400ms"/>can they drop? <break time="350ms"/>Just a little?
<break time="400ms"/>Feel the heaviness... <break time="350ms"/>in your arms... <break time="300ms"/>your legs... <break time="250ms"/>letting gravity hold you.

night_truths: <break time="500ms"/>The night amplifies everything. <break time="400ms"/>Fear. <break time="350ms"/>Worry. <break time="300ms"/>Loneliness. <break time="250ms"/>That's just what night does.
<break time="400ms"/>Sleep isn't something you can force. <break time="350ms"/>Only... <break time="300ms"/>allow.
<break time="500ms"/>You've survived... <break time="400ms"/>every sleepless night before. <break time="350ms"/>You'll survive this one too.
self_compassion: <break time="400ms"/>Be gentle with yourself tonight. <break time="350ms"/>Your body is doing its best.
<break time="500ms"/>You're not broken... <break time="400ms"/>because you can't sleep. <break time="350ms"/>You're human.
<break time="400ms"/>Tomorrow you can problem-solve. <break time="350ms"/>Tonight... <break time="300ms"/>just be.
